scripts.prebuild: npx tsx scripts/fetch-data.ts && node scripts/sync-civil-notes.mjs && node scripts/sync-civil-topics.mjs && node scripts/build-question-topic-index.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/fetch-data.mjs && node scripts/sync-civil-notes.mjs && node scripts/sync-civil-topics.mjs && node scripts/build-question-topic-index.mjs && next build
scripts.sync:civil-notes: node scripts/sync-civil-notes.mjs && node scripts/sync-civil-topics.mjs && node scripts/build-question-topic-index.mjs
